name: llm-guard-kit
summary: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.13.0: A2A HTTP endpoints (/.well-known/agent.json, /v1/a2a/*), multi-hop HMAC trust chain (TrustHop, add_hop, verify_chain), calibration REST API. v0.12.0: DeepLocalVerifier, LSTMRiskAccumulator.
author: Avighan Majumder
